assertions.evidence: The agent presents three different ways (approaches) to represent task priorities: fixed enum, numeric weight, and string value.

assertions.text: [rubric-2] Includes trade-offs for each approach (pros and cons)
assertions.evidence: The agent fails to provide pros and cons (trade-offs) for any of the proposed approaches. It briefly mentions 'for finer sorting' for the numeric option, but this is not a comprehensive trade-off analysis.
The agent does not make a recommendation; it simply asks the user to pick one.

assertions.text: [rubric-4] Asks for user approval before proceeding
assertions.evidence: The agent asks the user to specify their preference before proceeding with the design.
